title: Churches and politicians in South Sudan call for 'lasting peace' in Easter messages
content: There are fears South Sudan may be plunged back into a civil war less than a decade after it ended.

content: Ordinary Iranians respond to the US president's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges unless it opens the Strait of Hormuz.
